metadata.description: SETEC stylometric framework: AI-prose smoothing diagnosis, voice-coherence comparison, manifest validation, and craft restoration.

plugins.name: setec-voiceprint
plugins.description: Stylometric tools for AI-prose detection and voice-coherence diagnosis. Four task surfaces: smoothing diagnosis (Layer A variance signals), voice-coherence comparison (Burrows-style Delta + cluster mode + idiolect preservation lists), validation (manifest integrity + corpus-hygiene gate + ROC/PR harness on smoothing and voice-coherence), and craft-restoration (AIC flag families, source triage, rhetorical countermoves, metric-targeted restoration packets that translate diagnostic outputs into bounded revision-safe prompts). Python tooling spans manuscript-level audits, sliding-window localization, length-matched bootstrap percentiles, R `stylo` oracle verification, calibration toolchain, and MVP empirical validation against labeled corpora.
